calendar.matters:
Petition By Holger Siegwart, Proposed Administrator, For Prior Approval Of Right To Compensation As Administrator And For Services As Attorney For The Administrator
Off Calendar Apr-07-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Attorney Holger Siegwart on his own behalf.

The Court informed Counsel that dual compensation is not something that is ordinarily approved, that it is unlikely he would receive any extraordinary fees and acknowledged that Counsel's ability to speak German is a benefit to the Estate. Mr. Siegwart stated that there are a number of bank accounts and investments, that it is a fairly small Estate (under $200,000.00) and that some of the assets are located in Germany. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with bond set at $194,000.00 and the Petition for Prior Approval of Right to Compensation as Administrator and for Services as Attorney for the Administrator (subject to review of the orders (2)).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
